## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly Strategy Sprint Standup to align on project progress, discuss client updates, and address ongoing challenges across multiple accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/pLvCSLUqY8i8Fa3yUv3WqTnHC8VNkpo5?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple accounts (Diligent, Monograph, Metronome) require careful scope management and expectation setting](https://fathom.video/share/pLvCSLUqY8i8Fa3yUv3WqTnHC8VNkpo5?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [LLM visibility should be a priority focus for all engagements, with regular reviews and discussions](https://fathom.video/share/pLvCSLUqY8i8Fa3yUv3WqTnHC8VNkpo5?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Potential churn risk identified for Interwell; team to prepare contingency plans](https://fathom.video/share/pLvCSLUqY8i8Fa3yUv3WqTnHC8VNkpo5?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Strategy Sprint progress to be assessed week-by-week in tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/pLvCSLUqY8i8Fa3yUv3WqTnHC8VNkpo5?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)

## Topics
